untranslatable_reason: zscore_last is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This is a pairs trading signal requiring z-score calculation from cointegration analysis, which is not available in the standard indicator set. The hedge_ratio and cointegration calculations are external to the backtest engine's native indicators.
translation_notes: Signal structure correctly identifies mean reversion entry/exit logic (extreme z-score entry, mean reversion exit). However, z-score calculation from cointegrated pairs requires custom preprocessing. Recommend: (1) Pre-calculate z-scores externally and inject as custom indicator, or (2) Approximate using normalized spreads and Bollinger Band percentage (bb_pct_b) with analogous thresholds.
